name: agy
description: Delegate review and rescue workflows to the local Antigravity CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate reviews and rescue tasks to agy.
interface.longDescription: Use the local Antigravity CLI from Codex to review code, run adversarial reviews, or delegate rescue tasks through a shared Node.js companion runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use agy to review my current changes.
Ask agy to run an adversarial review.
Delegate this rescue task to agy.
